author: @jonc4271
text:
Hi, I see that you make many things with a 3D printer. 
But as I know with everything, people start with a one that have 2 criteria. For some it might be that they CAN buy a expensive one, or some might be the physical size. 
Now I know that if I was getting one, as much as I would LOVE to be able to get a one that was large and a print head that could do as small of a step as possible, as I know that it might take longer, but it can make whatever you are printing as a more accurate and of a finer quality of the end product. 
As I know that you get company’s that sponsor you with FREE advertising or FREE equipment. 
So what I would LOVE to know, is if you have a 3D printer that is still in working condition, but as you might have had a 3D upgrade of printer, then you will have a spear one that is taking room up in your workshop. As if this is so, if I was to pay for the P&P, would you let me have one that you could let me have, so that I can have a go at creating and also making some wind or water powered electric turbines of my own. As even a one that you can use a very small electric motor as a power source, and print something that could generate enough power to charge a 3.7Volt battery and use a step up to be able to charge a mobile phone. As I know that when I would go camping, I would tend to go away on my own, and NOT on the beaten track but out in the middle of nowhere. But to ALWAYS have power so that I could power up my phone for EMERGENCY use and also for a bit of entertainment on the night. As sometimes I could go away for 2 to 3 weeks at a time. So apart from me having to go to a campsite to plug into the power supply in the toilets, or to ask the warden or the owner to let me plug into the office plug sockets. 
But the whole reason that I would up sticks and be in the back of beyond, was a way for me to get out of the way of everyone and to put my head back in a positive attitude. 
I know that it is a bit of a ask, but as my late grandmother would ALWAYS say to me was “You got a thing under your nose and above your chin, and if you NEVER use it, then you will NEVER know if that person can help you or point me in the right direction”. As what is the only thing that someone can say to you, as they could say YES or NO. If they say NO, then you have never lost anything, but if they say YES, then that is a WIN WIN situation for me. 
As I know that I am the sort of person, that I have been given things for free, as a guy that I know that is a radio HAM, but he got married and moved house, so he had a LOT of equipment that might have been a few years old but is still working, then for someone that is just starting out, it is a good thing for them to get them started. As he gave me three 2 meters (in radio frequency) radios, and a small audio graphic equaliser. As for me, just 1 radio did me, so I literally GAVE the other 2 radios away to some that had just passed their foundation licence, and gave the audio equaliser to a GOOD friend who had NO money. As he asked me how much did I want for it. As I told him that I would charge him the same amount for it that I had paid for it. Well as I paid NOTHING for it, that is how much I asked him for. 
As I think that is how things SHOULD be with people. But the thing that I dislike, is when someone is GIVEN something for FREE, and for it to be given as good will. But then for them to to look up the price on eBay or whatever site that they may use, then to expect to get that money for that thing. But to NOT even give the person that had given the thing for free in the first place, to offer them 50% of the money that they got. 
I call that sort of a person as a TAKER, and I know many like that. I know that I had bought a box of telescopic antennas, I think I had bought about 500 antennas, so had MORE than what I needed. I had fitted 2 of them antennas into a small potting enclosure and put epoxy putty over it all. As it would help them at the radio club to show others what a dipole antenna looked like, and about how a dipole antenna’s length would change depending on the radio frequency that was used. 
As it was received with open arms, and some also would take it out of the club to use when someone wanted to go out in the field and try and get contacts all over the UK, Europe or even the World. 
But as it only cost me next to nothing, as a lot of the things I had at home from projects and things that I had been given. 
But getting back to the point, could you PLEASE 🙏 help me if you have a 3D printer that is not used as much as one of your NEW printers that you have. 

Many thanks in advance, from John (Knobby) in Hartlepool UK 🇬🇧 

Yours in great anticipation.

author: @seabeepirate
text: I like the similarity between the wind pump and the mechanical rectifier. What if you made a wind turbine with a single large blade, a mechanical rectifier and a gear box like the rectifier for the train rails a couple videos back. Rather than spin all the way round it might swing back and fourth. The pitch of the blade could even change with a simple linkage.
